MYOSIST Intra-Aortic Balloon Catheter 8F (35cc)

MYOSIST · Intra-Aortic Balloon Pumps

The MYOSIST™ Intra Aortic Balloon Catheter Kit (8F) is a high-performance hemodynamic support system designed for patients with critical cardiac conditions. It features a polyurethane balloon membrane tested for 1 million inflation-deflation cycles, providing durability and reliable performance during counterpulsation therapy.

MaterialPolyurethane

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

MYOSIST Intra Aortic Balloon Catheter Kit 8F features a 35cc polyurethane balloon designed for hemodynamic support in cardiovascular procedures. The 8 French profile catheter offers optimal deliverability with 227mm balloon length and 870mm total catheter length, suitable for patients 155-165cm height. Compatible with 0.025" guidewires and engineered for reliable IABP therapy with maximum dilation pressure of 5 PSI.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MYOSIST Intra-Aortic Balloon Catheter 8F (35cc), strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MYOSIST Intra-Aortic Balloon Catheter 8F (35cc) is constructed using Polyurethane, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
